title: Why the TCS Nashik case has sparked outrage | Pulse Maharashtra
description: A major police investigation is underway into allegations involving employees at Tata Consultancy Services’ Nashik BPO facility. Multiple FIRs have been registered accusing certain staff members of sexual harassment, coercion, and attempts at religious conversion. As arrests are made and an SIT probes the claims, the case has triggered outrage and raised wider questions about workplace safety, consent, religious freedom, and due process.
